headline: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani Taps Amazon and Meta Antitrust Foe Lina Khan for Key Economic Role as Wall Street Watches for a Regulatory Shift
summary: Mamdani appoints Lina Khan, former FTC chair, to lead NYC's Economic Development Corp. Khan brings aggressive antitrust record to agency.
